If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Sales Ticker Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-sales-ticker-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The sales ticker will display purchases for sales order in these statuses:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "New"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pick"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pack"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pending Dispatch"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pending Pickup"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Dispatched"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In addition, products must also be "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Approved", "bold": true}, {"text": " for webstore to appear in the sales ticker."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Sales orders made in Neto POS will not display in the sales ticker."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the Sales Ticker add-on for your Neto webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the Sales Ticker add-on in the Marketing section, and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the number of days that you want to display orders from. For example, if you set it to 1 (the default), the sales ticker will display orders placed in the last 24 hours."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and then the "}, {"text": "Close", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Sales Ticker add-on is now installed."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Sales Ticker is automatically hidden on mobile to prevent it covering too much of the page. If you need to make changes to the design, click on the "}, {"text": "Script", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the add-on to be taken to the 3rd party scripts, where the add-on code is installed."}]}], "appearance": "info"}]
